data.title: PMX-Canvas Client-Side Architecture Overview
data.content:
# PMX-Canvas Client-Side Code Analysis

## High-Level Architecture

The pmx-canvas client is a **Preact-based interactive canvas visualization** for managing a node graph representing Claude agent sessions, code artifacts, execution traces, and context state.

**Key Framework:** Preact (lightweight React alternative) + Preact Signals (reactive state)

**Core Dependencies:**
- Preact & Preact Signals for reactivity
- Canvas 2D API (minimap rendering)
- SVG (edge connections)
- localStorage (persistent layout)
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time updates

---

## File Structure

```
src/client/
├── App.tsx                    # Root component + toolbar + HUD layout
├── types.ts                   # TypeScript interfaces
├── state/
│   ├── canvas-store.ts       # Preact Signals state management
│   ├── sse-bridge.ts         # SSE connection & server sync
│   └── intent-bridge.ts      # HTTP API calls to server
├── canvas/
│   ├── CanvasViewport.tsx    # Main canvas container with pan/zoom
│   ├── CanvasNode.tsx        # Individual node rendering + interactions
│   ├── Minimap.tsx           # Canvas minimap (180x120 px)
│   ├── ContextMenu.tsx       # Right-click menu
│   ├── SelectionBar.tsx      # Multi-select action bar
│   ├── ContextPinBar.tsx     # Persistent context indicator
│   ├── ContextPinHud.tsx     # HUD display for pinned nodes
│   ├── ExpandedNodeOverlay.tsx  # Full-viewport focus mode
│   ├── DockedNode.tsx        # Docked status/ledger/context nodes
│   ├── EdgeLayer.tsx         # SVG edge rendering
│   ├── SnapshotPanel.tsx     # Canvas snapshot management
│   ├── use-pan-zoom.ts       # Pan/zoom hook
│   ├── use-node-drag.ts      # Node dragging hook
│   └── use-node-resize.ts    # Node resizing hook
└── nodes/
    ├── MarkdownNode.tsx      # Rich markdown editor/renderer
    ├── FileNode.tsx          # File viewer with syntax highlighting
    ├── StatusNode.tsx        # Agent phase/status indicator
    ├── LedgerNode.tsx        # Key-value ledger display
    ├── TraceNode.tsx         # Tool call trace indicator
    ├── ContextNode.tsx       # Agent context cards
    ├── McpAppNode.tsx        # Embedded MCP app frame
    ├── ExtAppFrame.tsx       # External app wrapper
    ├── ResponseNode.tsx      # Response/prompt nodes
    └── StatusSummary.tsx     # Compact status view
```

---

## Core State Management (canvas-store.ts)

Using Preact Signals (reactive, no re-render overhead):

### Core Signals
- **viewport**: {x, y, scale} - Canvas pan/zoom state
- **nodes**: Map<id, CanvasNodeState> - All nodes in canvas
- **edges**: Map<id, CanvasEdge> - Node connections
- **activeNodeId**: string | null - Currently focused node (for Tab cycling)
- **selectedNodeIds**: Set<string> - Multi-node selection (Shift+click)
- **contextPinnedNodeIds**: Set<string> - Nodes pinned as persistent context
- **expandedNodeId**: string | null - Node in full-viewport overlay
- **pendingConnection**: {from: string} | null - In-progress edge creation
- **connectionStatus**: 'connecting' | 'connected' | 'disconnected'
- **sessionId**: string - Session identifier
- **traceEnabled**: boolean - Trace collection enabled
- **canvasTheme**: 'dark' | 'light'
- **hasInitialServerLayout**: boolean - Server sync complete

### Key Actions
- **Node CRUD**: addNode, updateNode, updateNodeData, removeNode
- **Edge CRUD**: addEdge, removeEdge, removeEdgesForNode
- **Selection**: toggleSelected, selectNodes, clearSelection
- **Context Pins**: toggleContextPin, addContextPins, clearContextPins
- **Viewport**: setViewport, fitAll, focusNode, cycleActiveNode (Tab)
- **Node State**: toggleCollapsed, dockNode, undockNode, bringToFront
- **Focus Mode**: expandNode, collapseExpandedNode
- **Layout**: autoArrange (grid layout), persistLayout, restoreLayout

---

## Node Types & Appearance

### 1. **Status Node** (phase indicator)
- Badge: "STATUS"
- Displays: phase, detail, active tool, subagent state, message
- Color-coded phase indicator with pulse animation
- Always one per session (status-main)
- Can be docked left/right

### 2. **Markdown Node** (rich content editor)
- Badge: "MD"
- Block-based editor with live preview
- Syntax: fenced code, tables, headings supported
- Can edit inline or full-screen (expanded mode)
- Supports block-level selection
- Auto-fits height on load (max 600px)

### 3. **File Node** (code viewer)
- Badge: "FILE"
- Language detection from extension
- Line numbering with responsive gutter width
- Monospace font rendering
- Expandable for full-screen reading
- Shows line count, updated timestamp

### 4. **Context Node** (agent context cards)
- Badge: "CONTEXT"
- Displays structured context cards (title, summary, path, category, status)
- Normalizes categories: 'profile' → 'Operator', 'planning'/'memory' → 'Product'
- Shows source kind (Global/Workspace) and status (Loaded/Missing/Stale/Invalid)
- Dockable, collapsible
- Supports "required" badge

### 5. **Ledger Node** (key-value display)
- Badge: "LOG"
- Renders key-value pairs with auto-formatted keys
- Monospace values for numbers/objects
- Dockable right side
- Simple tabular layout

### 6. **Trace Node** (tool execution trace)
- Badge: "TRACE"
- Compact inline display: status icon + tool name + summary
- Status icons: ⠋ (running), ✓ (success), ✕ (failed)
- Category colors: MCP (accent), file (warn), subagent (purple)
- Pulse animation when running
- Truncates summary to 30 chars

### 7. **MCP App Node** (embedded tools)
- Badge: "APP"
- Embeds iframe with sandbox restrictions
- Two modes:
  - **iframe mode**: Embedded MCP app (allow-same-origin for backend comms)
  - **ext-app mode**: ExtAppFrame wrapper (custom host bridge)
  - **fallback mode**: Warning + external link (if embedding fails)
- Shows "Unverified domain" warning if not trusted
- Opens in new tab via button (top-right)

### 8. **Response Node** (LLM responses)
- Badge: "RESPONSE" (not fully detailed in code examined)
- Likely markdown-like rendering

### 9. **Prompt Node** (LLM prompts)
- Badge: "PROMPT" (similar to Response)

---

## User Interactions & Keyboard Shortcuts

### Canvas Pan/Zoom
| Action | Method |
|--------|--------|
| Pan | Drag background (pointer) |
| Pan | Scroll without modifier |
| Zoom in | Scroll + Ctrl/Cmd |
| Zoom centered on mouse | Ctrl/Cmd scroll |
| Pinch zoom | Two-finger touch |
| Reset view (1:1) | Cmd+0 |
| Zoom in | Cmd++ or Cmd+= |
| Zoom out | Cmd+- |

### Node Selection & Focus
| Action | Shortcut |
|--------|----------|
| Select node | Click |
| Multi-select | Shift+Click (toggle) |
| Lasso select | Shift+Drag background |
| Clear selection | Esc |
| Cycle focus | Tab / Shift+Tab |
| Bring to front | Click node (auto) |
| Focus (center) | Context menu → Focus |
| Close expanded mode | Esc |

### Node Manipulation
| Action | Method |
|--------|--------|
| Drag/move | Drag title bar |
| Resize | Drag corner handle |
| Rename | Double-click title |
| Collapse | Button or context menu |
| Expand (full-screen) | Button or context menu (⤢) |
| Close | Button or context menu |
| Pin in place | Context menu (excludes from auto-arrange) |
| Dock left/right | Context menu (status/ledger only) |
| Pin as context | Button (⊙) or context menu |

### Edge Connections
| Action | Method |
|--------|--------|
| Start connection | Context menu → "Connect from here" |
| Complete connection | Context menu → "Connect from X" |
| Show edge count | Context menu |
| Remove edge | (No direct UI - requires server action) |

### Toolbar Buttons
| Button | Action | Shortcut |
|--------|--------|----------|
| ◻ | Fit all nodes | None |
| 1:1 | Reset view (1:1 scale) | Cmd+0 |
| + | Zoom in | Cmd++ |
| − | Zoom out | Cmd+- |
| ⊞ | Auto-arrange (grid) | None |
| ◫ | Toggle minimap | None |
| ☀/☾ | Toggle light/dark theme | None |
| ◈ | Open snapshots panel | None |
| ◉ | Toggle trace collection | None |
| ⌫ | Clear trace nodes | (when trace active) |

### Multi-Select Actions (SelectionBar)
When 2+ nodes selected:
- **Pin as context**: Add all to persistent context, clear selection
- **Connect**: Create edges between all pairs (combinatorial)
- **Clear**: Deselect all

### Context Pins
- Nodes can be pinned as "context" (persistent agent context)
- Displays in HUD: "⊙ N node(s) in context"
- Synced to server (/api/canvas/context-pins)
- Shows in bottom bar during session
- Clear via ContextPinBar button

---

## Toolbar Status Display

Top toolbar shows:
- **Connection dot**: connecting/connected/disconnected (color-coded)
- **Session ID**: First 12 chars of session (truncated)
- **Node/edge/trace counters**: "X nodes · Y edges · Z traces" (if synced)
- **Trace status**: "trace armed" (if enabled but empty) or trace count
- **Sync status**: "Syncing canvas…" (until hasInitialServerLayout)

---

## Minimap

**Location**: Fixed bottom-right (180x120 px, z-index 9998)

**Features**:
- Canvas element rendering (not SVG)
- Colored rects for each node type:
  - Markdown (accent color)
  - MCP-App (ok/green)
  - Status (warn/orange)
  - Context (muted)
  - Ledger (dim)
  - Trace (purple)
- Edges drawn as thin lines with type-specific colors
- Viewport rectangle overlay (accent stroke)
- Click/drag to navigate main canvas
- Theme-aware (dark/light)

---

## Focus Mode (Expanded Node Overlay)

**Trigger**: Click ⤢ button or context menu → Expand

**Appearance**:
- Full-viewport overlay (z-index 10001)
- Blurred dark background (rgba 85%)
- Centered panel (max 1200px wide)
- Bordered by node type (accent or warn if pinned)
- Shadow glow effect

**Header Bar**:
- Node type badge
- Node title (with truncation)
- Context pin toggle (⊙)
- Copy button (for markdown/file with text)
- Word count display
- Esc hint
- Close button (×)

**Content Area**:
- Full-height, scrollable
- Renders node content expanded (larger fonts)
- Markdown: full editor/preview
- File: larger code font (13px vs 11px)

---

## SSE Bridge (Real-Time Sync)

**Connection**: GET /sse/canvas (EventSource)

**Key Events Handled**:
1. **canvas:layout** - Initial layout sync (nodes, edges, viewport)
2. **canvas:node:add** - New node created
3. **canvas:node:update** - Node data/position changed
4. **canvas:node:remove** - Node deleted
5. **canvas:edge:add** - Edge created
6. **canvas:edge:remove** - Edge removed
7. **canvas:theme:change** - Light/dark theme toggle
8. **markdown:update** - Content changed (sync to node data)
9. **file:update** - File content changed (sync cache)
10. **response:start** - LLM response stream begins
11. **response:delta** - Response chunk received
12. **response:complete** - Response finished
13. **trace:add** - New tool trace entry
14. **session** - Session info (ID, trace enabled)

**Reconnection**:
- Auto-reconnects with exponential backoff (max 30s)
- Saves layout before disconnect
- Restores from localStorage on reconnect
- Applies server overrides (new nodes/edges win)

**Response Threading**:
- Maps responseNodeId → threadPromptNodeId
- Routes deltas into thread's turns array instead of separate node
- Cleans up mapping on response-complete

---

## Intent Bridge (Server Communication)

**POST /api/workbench/intent** - Send user actions
- trace-toggle: Enable/disable trace collection
- trace-clear: Clear all trace nodes
- mcp-app-focus: Focus app in TUI

**POST /api/canvas/context-pins** - Sync context pins to server
- Updates agent's persistent context

**GET /api/file?path=X** - Fetch file content
**POST /api/file/save** - Save file edits
**POST /api/render** - Render markdown to HTML
**GET /api/canvas/state** - Fetch canvas state
**POST /api/canvas/update** - Push layout changes (positions, sizes, collapsed state)
**POST /api/canvas/edge** - Create edge connection
**GET /api/canvas/snapshots** - List snapshots
**POST /api/canvas/snapshot** - Save snapshot
**POST /api/canvas/snapshot/restore** - Restore snapshot
**DELETE /api/canvas/snapshot/:id** - Delete snapshot

---

## Layout Persistence

**Storage Key**: `pmx-canvas-layout` (localStorage)

**Persisted Data**:
- Viewport (x, y, scale)
- Node positions, sizes, collapsed/pinned state, dockPosition
- Edges (all properties)
- Context pinned node IDs

**When Saved**:
- On every pan/zoom
- On node drag end
- On node resize end
- On toggle collapsed/pinned/dock
- On manual context pin changes

**Restored On**:
- Page load (via restoreLayout)
- SSE reconnect (applied as overrides to new server layout)

---

## Auto-Arrange Algorithm

**Trigger**: Toolbar ⊞ button

**Behavior**:
- Skips pinned nodes and docked nodes
- Arranges in grid layout:
  - Cols = sqrt(nodeCount)
  - Gap = 24px between nodes
  - Starts at (40, 80)
  - Left-to-right, top-to-bottom

---

## Theme System

**Toggle**: Toolbar ☀/☾ button

**Implementation**:
- Signal: canvasTheme ('dark' | 'light')
- Sets data-theme attribute on documentElement
- CSS variables: --c-panel, --c-text, --c-accent, etc.
- Token cache invalidated on change
- Minimap & edges redrawn

---

## Known Limitations & Gaps in UX

### Missing/Incomplete Features:
1. **No edge deletion UI** - Server-side only, no context menu option
2. **No bulk edge creation** - Multi-select "Connect" only creates pairs, not custom types
3. **No edge type selection** - Always creates "relation" edges (server creates typed edges)
4. **No node search/filter** - No way to find nodes by name in large graph
5. **No zoom bookmarks** - No way to save/recall specific views
6. **No grid snap** - Free-form positioning only
7. **No undo/redo** - Layout changes are immediate and persistent
8. **No export** - Can save snapshots but not export layout as JSON/image
9. **Limited mobile** - Touch pinch works but no dedicated touch controls
10. **No node grouping** - No way to visually group/cluster related nodes
11. **No custom node colors** - Type-based coloring only
12. **No node linking** - Cannot click node connections to jump between them
13. **No comment nodes** - Annotation-only nodes not available
14. **Context pin sync lag** - Pins sent to server but no confirmation UI
15. **No edge labels in edit mode** - Edge labels shown but not editable from canvas
16. **No bulk operations** - No mass rename, move, delete (except clear selection)

### UX Friction Points:
1. **Edge creation awkward** - 2-step context menu process, no drag-to-connect
2. **No visual feedback for pending connection** - Hard to tell if "Connect from here" worked
3. **Minimap navigation slow** - No keyboard shortcut, must use mouse
4. **Docking limited** - Only status/ledger/context; others stuck on canvas
5. **Collapsed nodes show no preview** - Just title bar, no hint of content
6. **Context pins not obviously different** - Same node, just pinned flag
7. **No autosave indicator** - Unclear if changes persisted to server
8. **Trace nodes transient** - Easily missed if scrolled off-screen
9. **File node reload hidden** - Requires context menu, no visible "stale" indicator
10. **Selection cleared on Esc** - Useful but might lose multi-select intent accidentally

---

## Performance Characteristics

### Strengths:
- Preact Signals avoid unnecessary re-renders
- Viewport CSS transform (matrix) for smooth pan/zoom
- Canvas 2D for minimap (lighter than SVG)
- SVG edges only redrawn on change (not every frame)
- Lazy iframe loading for MCP apps

### Potential Bottlenecks:
- Large node count (100+): pan/zoom may stutter
- Many edges: SVG path rendering could slow
- Markdown block-level editing: DOM manipulation on every edit
- File node with 1000+ lines: monospace rendering overhead
- Minimap redraw on every node move: signal-driven, runs often

---

## Code Quality Observations

### Strengths:
- Clear separation of concerns (canvas, state, nodes)
- Hooks for reusable interactions (usePanZoom, useNodeDrag)
- Signals-based state (reactive, performant)
- Type safety with TypeScript
- Graceful error handling (catch blocks, fallbacks)

### Areas for Improvement:
- ContextMenu buildMenuItems is long (70+ lines)
- Node renderer imports scattered across CanvasViewport, ExpandedNodeOverlay
- Magic numbers for sizes (600px max, 37px titlebar) scattered
- No input validation on node data
- SSE event handling could be more structured
- Drag/resize interaction logic is complex and dense
